items.title: Pebblebee Halo is an Apple Find My/Android Find Hub tracker, flashlight, and safety siren, all for just $40 this Prime Day
items.summary:
Pebblebee Halo Apple Find My/Android Find Hub tracker

Buy for $40 (Reg. $60)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

Pebblebee’s Halo stands out by working with both Apple Find My and Android Find Hub, so it is not tied to one platform. It is a compact, USB-C rechargeable unit with a carabiner clip, but it also doubles as a flashlight and personal safety alarm. You can pull off its magnetic cap to trigger a 130dB siren and a 150-lumen flashing strobe, and the Pebblebee app can also share your live location with trusted contacts.

You can get started with something like the NASync DH2300 2-Bay Desktop NAS for $175.99 shipped. It launched late last year at $210 and has been selling closer to $220 lately, so today’s deal takes $44 off and lands within $8 of the all-time low. Add your own drives to this and it can serve as a personal cloud for photos, videos, documents, and backups that you can access from your devices without paying for more iCloud, Google One, or Dropbox storage every month.
